creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
Created attachment 160828
Screenshots of extensions.

I was using libreoffice 4.3 with VRT extensions for network diagrams.
But after upgrading to libreoffice 5.0, there is no extension manager listed under "Tools" menu. 
Nor the gallery button present in the "Drawing" toolbar at the bottom using with which I can access the installed pictures from the extension.

Refer the attached screenshots from version 4.3 where all these are present.
I had to downgrade to version 4.3. 

Is it possible to have two versions of libreoffice available for users? 
This will help people/organizations who use old but supported versions.

#VRT extensions
https://extensions.libreoffice.org/extension-center/vrt-network-equipment
http://www.vrt.com.au/downloads/vrt-network-equipment

[..]
